title: Page Builder

fields.label: Content Sections
fields.name: cms
fields.instructions: Build your page by adding and arranging content sections below. Each section is a modular layout component that you can customize independently. Drag sections to reorder them, and use the collapse/expand controls to manage your workspace efficiently. Note: When using the Page Builder, the standard WordPress content editor is hidden and the 'Show Page Title' setting in the sidebar is ignored.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Accessible page heading. This is visually hidden when hero artwork is uploaded.

sub_fields.label: First Line Artwork
sub_fields.name: first_line_artwork
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the prepared first line artwork, for example Welcome To.

sub_fields.label: Second Line Artwork
sub_fields.name: second_line_artwork
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the prepared second line artwork, for example Bubble Stop.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Short supporting copy displayed below the artwork.
sub_fields.placeholder: Taiwanese bubble tea culture meets modern British café lifestyle.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: button_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional hero call to action, for example View Menu.

sub_fields.label: Eyebrow
sub_fields.name: eyebrow
sub_fields.instructions: Optional small heading above the main title.

sub_fields.label: Heading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading.

sub_fields.label: Content
sub_fields.name: content
sub_fields.instructions: Main section copy.

sub_fields.label: Highlights
sub_fields.name: highlights
sub_fields.instructions: Optional bullet points displayed below the content.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: button_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional call-to-action button.

sub_fields.label: Media Position
sub_fields.name: media_position
sub_fields.instructions: Choose which side displays the media.

sub_fields.label: Media Type
sub_fields.name: media_type
sub_fields.instructions: Choose an image or video.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the section image.

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: video
sub_fields.instructions: Configure the section video.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: button_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button displayed below the carousel.

sub_fields.label: Product Categories
sub_fields.name: categories
sub_fields.instructions: Select the product categories to display as tabs. Drag selected terms to control tab order.

sub_fields.label: Products Per Category
sub_fields.name: product_limit
sub_fields.instructions: Maximum products loaded for each category.

sub_fields.label: Reward Cards
sub_fields.name: cards
sub_fields.instructions: Add the loyalty reward cards displayed in this section.

sub_fields.label: Instructions
sub_fields.name: instructions
sub_fields.instructions: Short instructions displayed below the reward value.
sub_fields.placeholder:
Scan QR code
with your phone's camera to install
the digital loyalty card in your wallet

sub_fields.label: QR Code
sub_fields.name: qr_code
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the QR code image.

sub_fields.label: Reward Artwork
sub_fields.name: reward_artwork
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the cup or drink artwork.

sub_fields.label: Quote
sub_fields.name: quote
sub_fields.placeholder: The best bubble tea spot in South London!

sub_fields.label: Author Detail
sub_fields.name: author_detail
sub_fields.instructions: Optional role, location, or short detail shown beside the author.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: Section heading text.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Body text. Supports basic HTML.

sub_fields.label: Button Link
sub_fields.name: button_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional CTA button. Leave empty to hide.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional section image.

sub_fields.label: Background Colour
sub_fields.name: background_color
sub_fields.instructions: Controls the section background via .bg-bubb-{value} utility class. Values map to CSS tokens: light=--bubb-color-light, subtle=--bubb-color-subtle, primary=--bubb-color-primary, dark=--bubb-color-dark.

description: Flexible content page builder for creating custom page layouts. Build pages using modular, reusable content sections that can be arranged in any order to create unique page designs.
